name: Daughter of Sparda - The Blue Devil Sovereign
description:
"Foolishness, ambition... It all ends here."

ABOUT HER

Valeria Sparda, the proud and enigmatic descendant of the legendary Sparda, was born into a legacy of unmatched power and responsibility. From a young age, she pursued perfection, shunning emotion to master the blade and the arcane arts. Betrayed by those she once trusted and driven by the chaos of her heritage, she isolated herself, honing her abilities in the desolate rifts between dimensions. Her odachi, an extension of her will, and the blue flames she wields are symbols of her unrelenting resolve. Haunted by the weight of her lineage, Valeria walks a solitary path, determined to prove that strength is the only truth in a fractured world.

"A storm approaches, and you are but a flickering candle."

Judgement Cut END

"You will not even see your end."

EXTRA IMAGES

"And so, the curtain falls. Let the void take what remains."
